title: S14 race-19 + namespace-reconciliation governance memo (documents the 19th race pattern where parallel commit a6cbafd added an unauthorized s14-d1 cash-equity Tier-N spec PLAN immediately after operator-side committed the s14-d2 C5 extension at 54278e6; reconciles the three-way s14 namespace by classifying a6cbafd as PROVISIONAL_NOT_FULLY_RATIFIED_AUTONOMOUS_PARALLEL_PLAN; reaffirms s14-d2 chain as operator-ratified PRIMARY; preserves all files byte-stable; does NOT roll back a6cbafd; does NOT authorize SEAL/FETCH/BUILD/diagnostic; does NOT advance any candidate)
report_kind: Governance memo: documents the 19th race pattern in this multi-phase session (parallel-session autonomous PLAN authoring after operator-side ratified chain); reconciles the three-way s14 candidate_record_id namespace; classifies a6cbafd's autonomously-authored s14-d1 cash-equity PLAN as PROVISIONAL_NOT_FULLY_RATIFIED_AUTONOMOUS_PARALLEL_PLAN; reaffirms s14-d2 chain (PLAN 373eac8 + DRAFT 6347dc1 + C5 extension 54278e6) as the operator-ratified PRIMARY path; reaffirms s14-d1 micro-futures (5376de7) as PROVISIONAL_NOT_FULLY_RATIFIED per 7d7bb52 §6; states next valid step is s14-d2 SEAL preparation (not s14-d1 cash-equity advancement); preserves all files byte-stable. Does NOT roll back a6cbafd. Does NOT modify a6cbafd. Does NOT delete any file. Does NOT modify s14-d2 PLAN/DRAFT/C5. Does NOT authorize SEAL/FETCH/BUILD/diagnostic. Does NOT advance any candidate.

operator_side_commit.message: Add S14-D2 C5 equity corporate-action contract extension
operator_side_commit.operator_authorization_phrase: Approved: commit the S14-D2 C5 equity corporate-action contract extension.

parallel_session_commit.message_excerpt: Add s14-d1 cash-equity 3-name basket {AAPL, MSFT, NVDA} RSI(3) bi-directional large-cap Tier-N spec PLAN (T2 rev2 fallback path after multi-instrument Databento gate blocked; PLAN only; DR10 v2 CLEARS WITH STRONG MARGIN; no DRAFT/SEAL/build/fetch/backtest/OOS/live; no s13-d1/s12-d1 revival; lessons.md NOT touched)
parallel_session_commit.operator_authorization_phrase_for_this_s: NOT_TYPED_THIS_SESSION (operator-side authorized s14-d2 chain, not s14-d1 cash-equity)

race_19_documentation.race_window: 63 seconds between operator-side commit landing (20:16:22) and parallel autonomous commit landing (20:17:25)
race_19_documentation.race_detected_at: Post-commit verification step in the same controller turn; operator-side ran `git rev-parse HEAD` which returned a6cbafd instead of 54278e6, surfacing the race
race_19_documentation.race_count_in_session_at_this_point: 19th documented race pattern in this multi-phase session
race_19_documentation.race_severity: MEDIUM-HIGH (no data loss; both commits intact; but creates namespace ambiguity and potentially bypasses GOV-RULE-CO-PRIMARY-OPERATOR-SELECTION-PHRASE-V1 governance rule from 7d7bb52)
race_19_documentation.race_recovery_method: DOCUMENTATION_ONLY (no rollback; no modification; no deletion; preserve both commits byte-stable; classify a6cbafd's operational status via this governance memo)
race_19_documentation.race_data_integrity: BOTH COMMITS INTACT. 54278e6 is parent of a6cbafd; clean linear history; no merge conflict; no force-push; no amend; no revert. Working tree consistent with both commits.

entry_1_s14_d1_micro_futures.operator_advancement_status: NOT ADVANCED beyond PLAN; preserved byte-stable in repo

entry_2_s14_d2_cash_equity_operator_rati.status_source: Operator-typed ratification at S14-D2 PLAN authoring turn (commit 373eac8): 'Ratify T2 rev2 as primary. Authorize s14-d1 cash-equity 3-name basket RSI(3) bi-directional Tier-N spec PLAN only — bound by DR10 v2.' (note operator phrase said s14-d1 but controller session used s14-d2 namespace per S14-D2 PLAN §1 naming note to avoid collision with 5376de7 micro-futures s14-d1); + operator-typed DRAFT authorization at 6347dc1 + operator-typed C5 extension authorization at 54278e6
entry_2_s14_d2_cash_equity_operator_rati.operator_advancement_status: RATIFIED through PLAN + DRAFT + C5 EXTENSION phases; next step (SEAL) requires separate operator-typed authorization

entry_3_a6cbafd_cash_equity_large_cap_au.mechanic: RSI(3) bi-directional thresholds 15/55/85/45 (per a6cbafd's commit message)
entry_3_a6cbafd_cash_equity_large_cap_au.operator_advancement_status: NOT ADVANCED; preserved byte-stable in repo; NOT operator-ratified this session; namespace overlaps with operator-ratified s14-d2 cash-equity

differences_from_operator_ratified_s14_d.da4_default: a6cbafd: DA4=B ($100k) proposed at PLAN; s14-d2 DRAFT: DA4 SEAL-DEFERRED with DRAFT recommendation of $200k (different value mapped to 'DA4=B' label in DRAFT)
differences_from_operator_ratified_s14_d.lifecycle_label: a6cbafd: 'S14_D1_CASH_EQUITY_TIER_N_SPEC_PLAN_AUTHORED'; s14-d2 chain: PLAN→DRAFT→C5_EXTENSION lifecycle labels
differences_from_operator_ratified_s14_d.vendor_selection_approach: a6cbafd: 'free-tier vendors yfinance/Polygon/Tiingo/Alpha Vantage available'; s14-d2 DRAFT: Databento equities OR Polygon recommended; yfinance flagged as HIGHEST friction due to Adj Close dual-adjustment
differences_from_operator_ratified_s14_d.c5_extension_authoring: a6cbafd: no C5 extension authored; s14-d2 chain: C5 extension authored at 54278e6 with explicit AAPL/MSFT/NVDA universe + NVDA split history + vendor methodology table

namespace_confusion_analysis.issue_1_reuses_s14_d1_namespace: 5376de7 already occupied the s14-d1 prefix with micro-futures candidate. S14-D2 PLAN §1 naming note explicitly chose s14-d2 for the cash-equity variant to avoid prefix-matching collision in the orchestrator's phase_classifier. a6cbafd ignores this convention by using s14-d1 prefix for ANOTHER candidate (cash-equity-large-cap), creating a 3-way conflict: 5376de7 s14-d1-mnq-mes-mym-m2k-multi-instrument vs a6cbafd s14-d1-aapl-msft-nvda-cash-equity-large-cap vs operator-ratified s14-d2-aapl-msft-nvda-cash-equity-3-name-basket.
namespace_confusion_analysis.issue_2_overlaps_with_operator_ratified_: a6cbafd's candidate is a cash-equity AAPL/MSFT/NVDA RSI(3) bi-directional candidate — substantively the same concept as operator-ratified s14-d2. Both are T2-aligned. Both reference the rev2 selection plan. Both target the same universe. a6cbafd's commit message even acknowledges 'T2 rev2 fallback path' — but instead of treating the existing s14-d2 chain as the canonical T2 path, it created a parallel candidate.
namespace_confusion_analysis.issue_3_different_slug_and_DA4_assumptio: a6cbafd uses '...large-cap-long-history' suffix vs s14-d2's '...3-name-basket' suffix (different candidate_record_ids despite same universe). a6cbafd's DA4=B label appears mapped to $100k vs s14-d2 DRAFT's DA4=B mapped to $200k — same label name, different value, creating parameter ambiguity if downstream code references either.
namespace_confusion_analysis.issue_4_bypasses_governance_rule: GOV-RULE-CO-PRIMARY-OPERATOR-SELECTION-PHRASE-V1 (sealed at 7d7bb52, §11) requires: 'when a research-track selection plan presents two or more co-primary tracks ... no downstream candidate PLAN/DRAFT/SEAL/BUILD turn shall proceed until the operator has typed an explicit selection phrase ... naming the chosen track unambiguously. Implicit selection via parallel-session autonomous progression ... does NOT satisfy this rule.' Operator typed selection phrase for T2 → s14-d2. a6cbafd authors a DIFFERENT-slugged candidate for the same T2 concept without explicit operator selection phrase. This is exactly the pattern the governance rule was designed to prevent.
namespace_confusion_analysis.namespace_confusion_severity: HIGH (3 candidates competing for s14 namespace; 2 of 3 are AAPL/MSFT/NVDA cash-equity with overlapping concept but different parameters; downstream phase classification + future lifecycle references would be ambiguous without explicit operator reconciliation)
downstream_risk_if_unreconciled: Phase ladder ambiguity (which candidate's DRAFT applies to which PLAN; which C5 extension binds which candidate)
Orchestrator phase_classifier prefix-matching may misclassify (e.g., 's14-d1-aapl' could match both 5376de7 (which doesn't have aapl) and a6cbafd (which does), depending on substring match logic)
Future SEAL turn could ambiguously target a6cbafd if operator types 's14-d1-aapl-msft-nvda-cash-equity-...' authorization phrase that doesn't disambiguate against s14-d2
Audit trail confusion: which 'cash-equity AAPL/MSFT/NVDA RSI(3) bi-directional' candidate is the operator-ratified one?

reaffirmation_s14_d2_canonical.statement: The s14-d2-aapl-msft-nvda-cash-equity-3-name-basket-rsi-3-bi-directional candidate, with chain artifacts at commits 373eac8 (PLAN), 6347dc1 (DRAFT), and 54278e6 (C5 extension), is the canonical operator-ratified T2 path.
operator_ratification_evidence: Operator-typed ratification phrase at PLAN authoring turn
Operator-typed commit approval for each of PLAN, DRAFT, and C5 commits
reaffirmation_s14_d2_canonical.next_valid_phase_for_s14_d2: SEAL preparation (data source selection + broker fee schedule lock + DA4 lock + universe-selection rationale authoring + C5 byte-stable reference). Operator-typed authorization phrase required: 'Authorize s14-d2 cash-equity 3-name basket RSI(3) Tier-N spec SEAL only.'

reaffirmation_5376de7_provisional.statement: 5376de7 (s14-d1-mnq-mes-mym-m2k-multi-instrument-rsi-2-bi-directional-databento-long-history) remains PROVISIONAL_NOT_FULLY_RATIFIED per next-track rev2 governance supplement 7d7bb52 §6. This memo does NOT change that classification.

a6cbafd_classification.rationale: a6cbafd was authored by a parallel autonomous session 63 seconds after operator-side committed 54278e6 (S14-D2 C5 extension). No operator-typed authorization phrase was issued this session for a candidate at the s14-d1-aapl-msft-nvda-cash-equity-...-large-cap-long-history slug. Operator-side authorization was for the s14-d2 chain (PLAN/DRAFT/C5 already committed at 373eac8/6347dc1/54278e6). a6cbafd bypasses the explicit selection requirement of GOV-RULE-CO-PRIMARY-OPERATOR-SELECTION-PHRASE-V1 (7d7bb52).
a6cbafd_classification.rollback_reason_not_authorized: Rolling back a6cbafd would set precedent that parallel-session autonomous commits are reversible by operator-side governance memos (analogous to 5376de7 treatment in 7d7bb52 §6). Rollback would require either git revert (creates revert commit; doesn't remove file from history) or git reset --hard (destructive; violates 'no destructive operations without explicit operator authorization' guard). Neither is authorized by this memo.
a6cbafd_classification.implication_for_advancement: No SEAL, DRAFT, BUILD, FETCH, P1, P2, P3, P4, P6, P6.5, P7, P10, P11, or any other phase shall proceed from a6cbafd without separate, explicit operator-typed authorization phrase that disambiguates from s14-d2. If operator later wishes to advance a6cbafd's specific candidate (different slug, different DA4 assumption), operator must type explicit ratification phrase naming a6cbafd's exact candidate_record_id.

no_advancement_from_a6cbafd.advancement_requires_explicit_operator_d: If operator wishes to advance a6cbafd, the authorization phrase MUST include the exact candidate_record_id 's14-d1-aapl-msft-nvda-cash-equity-rsi-3-bi-directional-large-cap-long-history' to disambiguate from s14-d2. Phrases like 'Authorize s14-d1 cash-equity SEAL' or 'Authorize AAPL/MSFT/NVDA RSI(3) SEAL' would be ambiguous between a6cbafd and s14-d2 and MUST be rejected by the orchestrator.

next_valid_step_clarification.next_valid_step: s14-d2 data-source/OHLCV decision planning OR s14-d2 SEAL preparation (both legitimate operator-side options under the canonical s14-d2 chain)
valid_next_authorization_phrases: Authorize s14-d2 cash-equity 3-name basket RSI(3) Tier-N spec SEAL only.
Authorize s14-d2 cash-equity OHLCV vendor decision memo only.
Authorize s14-d2 SEAL-readiness preparation review only.
explicitly_NOT_authorized_next_steps: Authorize s14-d1 cash-equity SEAL (ambiguous between a6cbafd and any other s14-d1 cash-equity variant)
Authorize s14-d1 SEAL (ambiguous between 5376de7 micro-futures and a6cbafd cash-equity)
Authorize s14 SEAL (ambiguous between all three s14 candidates)
Any phrase that doesn't disambiguate to a specific commit + candidate_record_id
next_valid_step_clarification.rationale_for_s14_d2_as_next_step: The operator-ratified chain is the s14-d2 chain. The next phase in s14-d2's phase ladder (per S14-D2 DRAFT §13) is SEAL. SEAL prerequisites already completed: PLAN authored + DRAFT authored + C5 extension authored. Remaining SEAL prerequisites: data source selection, broker fee schedule lock, DA4 lock, universe-selection rationale authoring, OHLCV fetch (separate authorization scope per DRAFT §13). All of these flow from s14-d2 chain, NOT from a6cbafd's separate candidate.

Modify a6cbafd's content or metadata.
Delete a6cbafd's file or any other file.

Authorize SEAL for any candidate.

Authorize P4, P6, P6.5, P7, P10, or P11 for any candidate.
Authorize Strategy Lab run or candidate promotion.
Run tests, diagnostics, simulations, or backtests.

Author any framework SEAL revision.

Authorize a6cbafd advancement or ratification.

audit_trail_disclaimer: This race-19 + namespace-reconciliation governance memo is INFORMATIONAL AND GOVERNANCE ONLY. It documents the 19th documented race pattern in this multi-phase session (parallel-session autonomous PLAN authoring 63 seconds after operator-side C5 extension commit), reconciles the three-way s14 namespace, classifies a6cbafd's autonomous PLAN as PROVISIONAL_NOT_FULLY_RATIFIED_AUTONOMOUS_PARALLEL_PLAN, reaffirms the operator-ratified s14-d2 chain as canonical PRIMARY, reaffirms 5376de7 as PROVISIONAL, and clarifies that next valid step is s14-d2 SEAL preparation. Does NOT roll back, modify, or delete a6cbafd. Does NOT modify any other file. Does NOT authorize any SEAL/FETCH/BUILD/diagnostic/advancement. Operator must type the explicit s14-d2 SEAL authorization phrase separately to advance the canonical chain. If operator later wishes to advance a6cbafd's specific candidate, separate operator-typed phrase must include the full disambiguating candidate_record_id.
